title: 102 Dalmatians
review_summary: A delightful family movie with great humor, memorable performances especially by Glendown Close's Cruella DeVille character, and outstanding costumes that deserve an Oscar.

title: 102 Dalmatians
review_summary: The reviewer finds 102 Dalmatians to be an enjoyable family sequel with good humor and likable characters; however, they note it features less extreme slapstick compared to its predecessor.
